description_long: This is a two-story house with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan color, accented by exposed wooden beams and trim in a warm orange-brown hue, giving it a half-timbered appearance. The front facade features a central door flanked by two square windows on the ground floor and two windows on the upper floor, one of which is larger and the other smaller. The side views reveal additional structural wooden supports and asymmetrically placed windows, while the rear view shows a pair of upper windows with vertical bars and a solid lower wall. The roof overhangs slightly, providing some shelter to the upper story and entryway. The overall design is simple yet sturdy, reminiscent of traditional European or Tudor-style urban houses.
description: A two-story, half-timbered house with a reddish-brown gable roof, beige walls, and wooden trim, featuring asymmetrical windows and a central entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two ground-floor windows, and two upper windows with wooden trim.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the roof structure, exposed beams, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible wooden supports and asymmetrically placed windows, including a small lower window.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying two upper windows with vertical bars and a solid lower wall, plus detailed roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with no porch, framed by wooden trim and a slight roof overhang.
